name: product-knowledge
description: Product-management workflow skills and Odoo functional knowledge for Hypefast PMs.

plugins.name: pm-workflow
plugins.description: PM execution toolkit: create Confluence pages/PRDs, file Jira backlog tickets, write PRD success criteria, fill PRD requirement tables (Description of the User Flows), and build BPMN process diagrams.

plugins.name: odoo-knowledge
plugins.description: Odoo functional knowledge across Essentials, Finance, HR, Productivity, Sales, Services, and Supply Chain modules.
